title: FloorPro Coir Entrance Matting - Cut To Size, Heavy Duty Indoor & Outdoor for Entrances, Doorway, Reception, Foyer Coconut Mat Strips Doormats (175cm x 100cm)
features: EXTRA HEAVY DUTY VERSION: Commercial or Home applicable, available in different sizes, perfect for Indoor and outdoor doormat is perfect to make an ideal large doormat.
HEAVY DUTY THICKNESS: These are extra tough coir bristles are great for hiding stains and mud. Features a tougher PVC backing than normal living coir mattings and is just over 17/18mm thickness
PICK A LENGTH: Select a dimension or you can order a larger size and re-cut to your own size.
COMMERCIAL RATED: FloorPro Heavy Duty version, coir doorway mats are more durable than the standard versions.
FLOORPRO: Made and used by professionals - also applicable with commercial applications such as pubs, clubs & restaurant's.
description: Product description Tougher Commercial Grade coir with stronger PVC backing Safety Warning May cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Secure installation recommended to prevent tripping hazards.
